# MineSweepVsProject 💣

> Windows XP 经典扫雷的高清还原加强版
> A highly-authentic reproduction of the classic Windows XP Minesweeper.

## 📝 简介 | Introduction

本项目是一个完全基于现代化技术栈仿制 Windows XP 经典【扫雷】的项目。
This project is a modern visual and functional reproduction of the classic Windows XP Minesweeper.

**特别说明 (Special Note)**: 
本项目绝大部分代码由 生成式文本模型 生成，开发者仅提供了功能框架。虽然当前的具体实现仅经过了简单的游玩测试，但体验感觉没有问题，运行流畅稳定！
*The vast majority of the code in this project was generated by AI based on a functional framework provided by the developer. While the current implementation has only undergone basic playtime testing, it feels solid and plays smoothly without noticeable issues!*

## ✨ 特色功能 | Features

- 🧊 **原版体验 (Authentic Experience):** 经典的外观、声效与游玩手感。 (Classic look, sounds, and feel.)
- 🎮 **现代操控 (Modern Controls):** 支持使用键盘操作扫雷，保护手腕。 (Introduced modern keyboard controls.)
- ⚙️ **高端 Debug UI (Built-in Settings UI):** 支持自由缩放画面大小、修改十字追踪器准心以及性能配置。 (Freely scale the UI, customize HUD crosshairs, and tweak graphics settings via an ImGui overlay.)
- 💾 **即时状态保存 (Progress Auto-Save):** 可以自由在中断游戏时将残局存储在硬盘中。 (Options to serialize and save game progress safely on quit.)
- ⚠️ **无首击保护 (No First-Click Protection):** 完美还原极度硬核的原版机制，第一下点击没有任何必不中雷的安全区。 (A hardcore reflection of the original mechanics: the first click is not guaranteed to be safe.)

## 🚀 未来计划 | Roadmap

- [ ] **局域网/网络对战模式 (Multiplayer Network Modes):** 
  目前代码及菜单中已经预留了有关网络连接对话框的功能代码，但后端的联机通信模块**由于时间规划暂时搁置，计划在未来抽出精力尝试实现网络联机版扫雷！**
  *(There is an ongoing plan to implement a local/online network-based PvP/Co-op mode. Menu code has been prototyped, but the backend communication layer is currently unwritten and planned for the future!)*

## 🛠️ 构建要求 | Build Instructions

- C++ 17 
- DirectX 11 
- Microsoft Visual Studio
